chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.02 of 2020 Kamaruddin Valika and others Versus Mrs. Shirley Aamiruddin Valika and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.10/2020 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 31.01.2025 Mr. Qazi Umair Ali, Advocate for the appellants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The withdrawal of the suit before the learned Single Judge has rendered this appeal as infructuous and, as conceded, it is not pressed by Mr. Qazi Umair Ali. The appeal as such is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
